name: DarNis Lounge
description: Our indoor DarNis Lounge offers the perfect blend of comfort and sophistication. Enjoy a selection of fine wines, premium liquors, and expertly crafted cocktails in a stylish and cozy setting. With plush seating, ambient lighting, and smooth music creating the perfect atmosphere, it's the ideal spot to unwind, socialize, and indulge in a refined experience.

menu.name: Signature Cocktail
menu.description: Premium spirits blended with fresh tropical fruits and house-made syrups

menu.name: Classic Old Fashioned
menu.description: Bourbon whiskey, Angostura bitters, sugar, orange peel

menu.name: Mojito
menu.description: White rum, fresh mint, lime juice, sugar, soda water

menu.name: Premium Red Wine
menu.description: Carefully selected premium red wine by the glass

menu.name: Premium White Wine
menu.description: Chilled premium white wine by the glass

menu.name: Premium Spirits
menu.description: Fine whisky, cognac, vodka, gin — served neat or on the rocks

menu.name: Soft Drinks & Mocktails
menu.description: Refreshing non-alcoholic options for all guests

name: Pool Side Bar
description: Our Pool Side Bar is the perfect spot to relax and refresh. Enjoy a selection of soft drinks, chilled beers, and premium liquor by the pool. With a vibrant atmosphere, comfortable seating, and great music setting the mood, it's the ideal place to unwind, socialize, and soak up the sunny vibes.

menu.name: Chilled Beer
menu.description: Ice-cold beer served poolside — perfect for hot sunny days

menu.name: Frozen Cocktail
menu.description: Blended frozen fruit cocktail to keep you cool

menu.name: Soft Drinks
menu.description: Cold soft drinks and fresh juices served at the pool

menu.name: Premium Liquor
menu.description: Fine spirits and premium liquor served by the pool

menu.name: Light Snacks
menu.description: Chips, peanuts, and light bites to enjoy by the water

menu.name: Water & Juices
menu.description: Bottled water and fresh squeezed juices
